title: AIIMS Delhi Clinical Psychologist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
short_info: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Clinical Psychologist Notification 2026 has been released on 18 May 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Delhi. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Clinical Psychologist Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.A. in Psychology (First Class), M.Phil in Clinical Psychology
qualification.details: M.A. in Psychology (First Class) M.Phil in Clinical Psychology

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Clinical Psychologist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 30th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Clinical Psychologist post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.A. in Psychology with First Class and an M.Phil in Clinical Psychology to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Clinical Psychologist post is 35 years. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Clinical Psychologist position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 72,800.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Clinical Psychologist post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Clinical Psychologist position at AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Make sure to follow the instructions carefully.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Clinical Psychologist role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of CVs followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, this is a contractual job opportunity at AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article for your convenience.
